text.title: Rails 7+ Backend Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: skip Service Object ceremony — model + controller is enough; still use Strong Params
wrap writes in transaction; fire side effects from after_create_commit OR chained Sidekiq
extract Service Object with shared ServiceResult; transaction inside #call
Sidekiq job accepting record_id + retry/dead policy + reload inside perform
gate PR on MIGRATION-REVIEW checklist; require human approval

text.example: shape=multistep_write_with_side_effects → has_side_effect=true → after-commit-for-side-effects → transaction creates user + roles, after_create_commit triggers WelcomeMailer.deliver_later.
